description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow complex set within a landscaped plot featuring a main building with white and tan exterior walls, flat and slightly sloped roofs, and multiple wings. The property includes a spacious swimming pool, a tennis court, several cabana-style outdoor seating areas, and a row of small guest huts or tents along one side. Palm trees and other greenery are distributed throughout the grounds, providing shade and a resort-like atmosphere. The main entrance is accessible from a paved road, and the building features large windows, balconies, and a covered veranda. The layout is open and luxurious, with ample outdoor recreational spaces and a clear separation between the main residence and auxiliary structures.
description: A modern, expansive bungalow complex with white and tan walls, flat roofs, a pool, tennis court, and lush landscaping, featuring multiple wings and outdoor amenities.
description_view_0: From this angle, the main bungalow building is prominent with its curved and angular sections, visible pool, tennis court, and several cabanas and palm trees.
description_view_1: This view highlights the road access, the front entrance, and the arrangement of the main building with the tennis court and guest huts visible to the right.
description_view_2: The rear of the property is shown, emphasizing the pool area, sun loungers, and the open recreational spaces behind the main bungalow.
description_view_3: This side view displays the row of guest huts, the pool, and the lush landscaping, with the main building and its balconies in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and balcony doors
